description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a classic, slightly ornate design. The front features two paneled doors, each adorned with rectangular insets and subtle carved animal motifs, and fitted with small round metal handles. The sides are plain, showcasing the natural wood grain, while the back is flat and unadorned, likely constructed from a thinner wood panel. The top of the cabinet has a prominent overhanging cornice, adding to its traditional aesthetic. The cabinet appears solid and robust, suitable for storing items securely behind its doors. Its overall appearance suggests it would be at home in an urban environment such as a residential entryway, garage, or even a sidewalk for temporary storage or donation.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with two paneled doors featuring carved details and metal handles, topped with a prominent cornice. The sides are plain, highlighting the wood grain, and the cabinet exudes a classic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with carved motifs and metal handles, as well as the overhanging cornice.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, vertical wood grain and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden panel, likely thinner than the front and sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain and cabinet depth.
